title: non-blocking assignment of '0 literal with delay causes syntax error
body:
---


Author Name: **Alex Solomatnikov**
Original Redmine Issue: 465 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2012-03-22


---

Code:

```
		soft_reset_req_reg <= #20 '0;

```

causes:

```
 syntax error, unexpected ';', expecting TYPE-IDENTIFIER

```
